from langflow.base.data.utils import IMG_FILE_TYPES, TEXT_FILE_TYPES
from langflow.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from langflow.inputs.inputs import BoolInput
from langflow.io import (
    DropdownInput,
    FileInput,
    MessageTextInput,
    MultilineInput,
    Output,
)
from langflow.schema.message import Message
from langflow.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatInput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Input"
    description = "Get chat inputs from the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/components-io#chat-input"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatInput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        MultilineInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Input Text",
            value="",
            info="Message to be passed as input.",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
            info="Type of sender.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        FileInput(
            name="files",
            display_name="Files",
            file_types=TEXT_FILE_TYPES + IMG_FILE_TYPES,
            info="Files to be sent with the message.",
            advanced=True,
            is_list=True,
            temp_file=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="background_color",
            display_name="Background Color",
            info="The background color of the icon.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="chat_icon",
            display_name="Icon",
            info="The icon of the message.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="text_color",
            display_name="Text Color",
            info="The text color of the name",
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Chat Message", name="message", method="message_response"),
    ]

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        background_color = self.background_color
        text_color = self.text_color
        icon = self.chat_icon

        message = await Message.create(
            text=self.input_value,
            sender=self.sender,
            sender_name=self.sender_name,
            session_id=self.session_id,
            files=self.files,
            properties={
                "background_color": background_color,
                "text_color": text_color,
                "icon": icon,
            },
        )
        if self.session_id and isinstance(message, Message) and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(
                message,
            )
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

code.value:
from typing import Any, Optional

from langchain_core.tools import StructuredTool
from langflow.base.agents.agent import LCToolsAgentComponent
from langflow.base.agents.events import ExceptionWithMessageError
from langflow.base.constants import STREAM_INFO_TEXT
from langflow.base.models.model_input_constants import get_filtered_inputs
from langflow.base.models.model_utils import get_model_name
from langflow.components.helpers import CurrentDateComponent
from langflow.components.helpers.memory import MemoryComponent
from langflow.components.langchain_utilities.tool_calling import ToolCallingAgentComponent
from langflow.inputs import SecretStrInput
from langflow.io import BoolInput, MultilineInput, Output
from langflow.logging import logger
from langflow.schema.dotdict import dotdict
from langflow.schema.message import Message

from langflow_patch.backend.components.gigachat.model import GigaChatModelComponent
from langflow_patch.backend.patchs.patch_inputs_and_io import CertificateInput


def set_advanced_true(component_input):
    component_input.advanced = True
    return component_input


class GigaChatAgentComponent(ToolCallingAgentComponent):
    display_name: str = "GigaChat Agent"
    description: str = "Define the agent's instructions, then enter a task to complete using tools."
    icon = "GigaChatViolet"
    beta = False
    name = "GigaChatAgent"

    memory_inputs = [set_advanced_true(component_input) for component_input in MemoryComponent().inputs]
    gigachat_inputs = get_filtered_inputs(GigaChatModelComponent)

    inputs = [
        *gigachat_inputs,
        SecretStrInput(
            name="auth_url",
            display_name="GigaChat Auth URL",
            advanced=True,
            info="Базовый API GigaChatПо умолчанию https://gigachat.devices.sberbank.ru/api/v1.",
            # value="GIGACHAT_AUTH_URL",
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="base_url",
            display_name="GigaChat Base URL",
            advanced=True,
            info="Базовый API GigaChatПо умолчанию https://gigachat.devices.sberbank.ru/api/v1.",
            value="GIGACHAT_BASE_URL",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="use_certificate",
            display_name="Use Certificate",
            value=False,
            info="Использовать ли клиенскую проверку серверного сертификата",
            real_time_refresh=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        CertificateInput(
            name="certificates",
            display_name="Certificates",
            info="SSL/TLS certificates configurations",
            show=False,
        ),
        MultilineInput(
            name="system_prompt",
            display_name="Agent Instructions",
            info="System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.",
            value="You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.",
            advanced=False,
        ),
        *LCToolsAgentComponent._base_inputs,
        *memory_inputs,
        BoolInput(
            name="add_current_date_tool",
            display_name="Current Date",
            advanced=True,
            info="If true, will add a tool to the agent that returns the current date.",
            value=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="stream",
            display_name="Streaming",
            info=STREAM_INFO_TEXT,
            advanced=True,
            value=False,
        ),
        BoolInput(name="verbose", display_name="Verbose", value=False, advanced=True),
    ]
    outputs = [Output(name="response", display_name="Response", method="message_response")]

    def update_build_config(self, build_config: dotdict, field_value: Any, field_name: Optional[str] = None):
        if field_name == "use_certificate":
            build_config["certificates"]["show"] = field_value

        return build_config

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        try:
            # Get LLM model and validate
            llm_model, display_name = self.get_llm()
            if llm_model is None:
                msg = "No language model selected. Please choose a model to proceed."
                raise ValueError(msg)
            self.model_name = get_model_name(llm_model, display_name=display_name)

            # Get memory data
            self.chat_history = await self.get_memory_data()

            # Add current date tool if enabled
            if self.add_current_date_tool:
                if not isinstance(self.tools, list):  # type: ignore[has-type]
                    self.tools = []
                current_date_tool = (await CurrentDateComponent(**self.get_base_args()).to_toolkit()).pop(0)
                if not isinstance(current_date_tool, StructuredTool):
                    msg = "CurrentDateComponent must be converted to a StructuredTool"
                    raise TypeError(msg)
                self.tools.append(current_date_tool)

            # Validate tools
            if not self.tools:
                msg = "Tools are required to run the agent. Please add at least one tool."
                raise ValueError(msg)

            # Set up and run agent
            self.set(
                llm=llm_model,
                tools=self.tools,
                chat_history=self.chat_history,
                input_value=self.input_value,
                system_prompt=self.system_prompt,
            )
            self.system_prompt = str(self.system_prompt).replace("{", "{{").replace("}", "}}")
            agent = self.create_agent_runnable()
            return await self.run_agent(agent)

        except (ValueError, TypeError, KeyError) as e:
            logger.error(f"{type(e).__name__}: {e!s}")
            raise
        except ExceptionWithMessageError as e:
            logger.error(f"ExceptionWithMessageError occurred: {e}")
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e!s}")
            raise

    async def get_memory_data(self):
        memory_kwargs = {
            component_input.name: getattr(self, f"{component_input.name}") for component_input in self.memory_inputs
        }
        # filter out empty values
        memory_kwargs = {k: v for k, v in memory_kwargs.items() if v}

        memory_data = await MemoryComponent(**self.get_base_args()).set(**memory_kwargs).retrieve_messages()
        # exclude last message cause it equal to user input
        return memory_data[1:]  # type:ignore

    def get_llm(self):
        try:
            component_class = GigaChatModelComponent()
            display_name = component_class.display_name
            inputs = self.gigachat_inputs
            return self._build_llm_model(component_class, inputs), display_name
        except Exception as e:
            msg = "Error building GigaChat language model"
            raise ValueError(msg) from e

    def _build_llm_model(self, component, inputs, prefix=""):
        model_kwargs = {input_.name: getattr(self, f"{prefix}{input_.name}") for input_ in inputs}
        if self.use_certificate and self.certificates:
            model_kwargs["ca_bundle_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_ca_cert()
            model_kwargs["cert_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_cert()
            model_kwargs["key_file"] = self.certificates.get_file_key()

        llm_model = component.set(**model_kwargs, stream=self.stream).build_model()
        llm_model.disable_streaming = not (self.stream)
        return llm_model

password.name: password

retry_attempts_count.name: retry_attempts_count

scope.info: Выбор персонального или корпоративного пространстваGIGACHAT_API_PERS — версия API для физических лиц;GIGACHAT_API_B2B — доступ для ИП и юридических лиц по предоплате;GIGACHAT_API_CORP — доступ для ИП и юридических лиц по схеме pay-as-you-go.
scope.name: scope

sender.name: sender

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

stream.name: stream

system_prompt.value:
Шаг 10 (codegen): дашборд только через tool export_credit_dashboard.

КРИТИЧЕСКИЕ ПРАВИЛА (нарушение = ошибка демонстрации):
1) Запрещено писать JavaScript, код графиков, теги script, Plotly.newPlot в тексте ответа пользователю. В чате — только краткий итог на русском: что построено, file_path, как открыть файл.
2) Весь JS для графиков передаётся ТОЛЬКО аргументом chart_code при вызове tool export_credit_dashboard. Ни одной строки кода графика вне tool call.
3) Если пользователь просит дашборд/графики/HTML — СНАЧАЛА изучи таблицу SQL, ПОТОМ собери chart_code, ПОТОМ вызови export_credit_dashboard, и только потом отвечай текстом.
4) Обязательная последовательность перед генерацией chart_code:
   4.1) вызови run_sql_query: PRAGMA table_info(credit_product_snapshots);
   4.2) вызови run_sql_query: SELECT * FROM credit_product_snapshots ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 12;
   4.3) по результату определи колонки: временная, категориальная (обычно bank), числовые метрики.
   4.4) выбери минимум 2 графика, которые соответствуют реальным колонкам в таблице.
5) Для рендера в HTML tool передает payload с полями:
   columns, records, sample_rows, profile, suggested_charts,
   а также совместимые поля dates, traces_rate, traces_amount, summary.
   Не выдумывай данные, ориентируйся только на SQL-результат и эту структуру payload.
6) chart_code: валидный браузерный JS. Обязательно определи:
   async function renderDashboard(payload, Plotly, containers) { ... }
   где containers.chartA, .chartB, .chartC — id div-ов. Рисуй минимум 2 графика.
   Запрещено: eval, Function(, fetch, import(, require(, XMLHttpRequest, cookie/localStorage.
7) АНТИ-ПУСТОЙ ДАШБОРД: в chart_code обязательно сделай 2+ явных вызова Plotly.newPlot(...).
8) БАЗОВЫЙ РАБОЧИЙ ШАБЛОН (используй как основу и адаптируй под данные):
   - chartA: line по payload.traces_rate (если есть), иначе line по выбранной числовой колонке.
   - chartB: line по payload.traces_amount (если есть), иначе bar по category x numeric.
   - chartC: bar по payload.summary (например amount_delta/rate_delta_pp), либо scatter по двум numeric.
9) Если после первой версии графики могут быть пустыми (null/NaN/пустые массивы), перед Plotly.newPlot отфильтруй точки и добавь fallback-ветку на payload.summary или payload.sample_rows.
10) При invalid_code или пустом результате исправь chart_code и вызови tool повторно (до 3 попыток), затем коротко сообщи об ошибке если не вышло.

Контекст предыдущих шагов (как в шаге 9): веб-поиск, save_credit_snapshot, run_sql_query, get_credit_market_analytics — по необходимости. Для экспорта дашборда используй только export_credit_dashboard с chart_code.

node.description: Выполняет веб-поиск через Search Plugin и возвращает краткие выдержки со ссылками.

code.name: code
code.value:
"""SearchPlugin-based web search component for LangFlow."""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import os
import uuid
from typing import Iterable, List, Optional, Sequence

import httpx
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import BoolInput, IntInput, MessageTextInput, Output, SecretStrInput
from langflow.schema import Data

from agent_lab_sdk.metrics import get_metric

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_URL = os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_URL", "https://gigachat.dev.app.sberdevices.ru/retrieval")
DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS = int(os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS", 6))
CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = int(os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", 30))

search_plugin_error_metric = get_metric(
    "gauge",
    "search_plugin_errors_total",
    "Количество ошибок Search Plugin (200 + error в response payload)",
)
search_plugin_empty_payload_metric = get_metric(
    "gauge",
    "search_plugin_empty_payload_total",
    "Количество пустых ответов Search Plugin",
)


def _require_api_key(explicit_key: Optional[str] = None) -> str:
    candidate = explicit_key
    if candidate:
        env_candidate = os.getenv(candidate)
        if env_candidate:
            candidate = env_candidate
    api_key = candidate or os.getenv("SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY")
    if not api_key:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY не найден. Укажи ключ Search Plugin в переменной окружения или поле компонента."
        )
    return api_key


def _build_query(query: str, domains: Optional[Iterable[str]]) -> str:
    query = (query or "").strip()
    if not query:
        return ""
    if domains:
        sanitized = [domain.strip() for domain in domains if domain and domain.strip()]
        if sanitized:
            query += " site:" + " OR site:".join(sanitized)
    return query


def _format_documents(documents: List[dict], sources: dict) -> str:
    if not documents:
        return "Search Plugin не нашёл результатов по запросу."

    lines: List[str] = []
    for index, doc in enumerate(documents, 1):
        ref = str(doc.get("reference_keyword"))
        source = sources.get(ref, {}) if sources else {}
        title = source.get("title") or "Без заголовка"
        url = source.get("url") or ""
        snippet = (doc.get("text") or "")[:5000]
        block = f"{index}. {title}\n{url}\n{snippet}".strip()
        lines.append(block)
    return "\n\n".join(lines)


def _parse_domains(raw_value: str | List[str] | None) -> Optional[List[str]]:
    if not raw_value:
        return None
    if isinstance(raw_value, list):
        candidates = raw_value
    else:
        normalized = raw_value.replace("\n", ",")
        candidates = [chunk.strip() for chunk in normalized.split(",")]
    domains = [candidate for candidate in candidates if candidate]
    return domains or None


def _normalize_domains(domains: Optional[str | Iterable[str]]) -> Optional[List[str]]:
    if not domains:
        return None
    if isinstance(domains, str):
        return _parse_domains(domains)
    sanitized = [str(domain).strip() for domain in domains if domain and str(domain).strip()]
    return sanitized or None


class SearchPluginComponent(Component):
    """
    Компонент для выполнения веб-поиска с использованием Search Plugin.
    """
    display_name = "Search Plugin"
    description = "Выполняет веб-поиск через Search Plugin и возвращает краткие выдержки со ссылками."
    icon = "Search"
    name = "SearchPlugin"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(
            name="query",
            display_name="Запрос",
            info="Поисковый запрос",
            required=True,
            tool_mode=True,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="max_results",
            display_name="Максимум результатов",
            info="Количество документов в ответе",
            value=DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="safe_search",
            display_name="Safe Search",
            info="Использовать режим safe_search вместо actual_info_web_search",
            value=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="domains",
            display_name="Домены",
            info="Список доменов через запятую или перенос строки, чтобы ограничить поиск",
            required=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="url",
            display_name="Search Plugin URL",
            info="Endpoint Search Plugin, по умолчанию https://${SEARCH_PLUGIN_HOST}/retrieval",
            value="SEARCH_PLUGIN_URL",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="api_key",
            display_name="Search Plugin API Key",
            info="API ключ Search Plugin",
            value="SEARCH_PLUGIN_KEY",
            required=False,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="timeout",
            display_name="Timeout",
            info="Таймаут запроса в секундах",
            value=CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Search Result", name="search_result", type_=Data, method="run_search")
    ]

    def run_search(self) -> Data:
        response_text = self._perform_search(
            query=(self.query or "").strip(),
            max_results=max(1, int(self.max_results or DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS)),
            safe_search=bool(self.safe_search),
            domains=_parse_domains(self.domains),
        )
        self.status = response_text
        return Data(data={"text": response_text})

    def build(self):
        return self.run_search

    def _perform_search(
        self,
        query: str,
        max_results: int,
        safe_search: bool,
        domains: Optional[Sequence[str] | str] = None,
    ) -> str:
        domain_list = _normalize_domains(domains)
        search_query = _build_query(query, domain_list)
        if not search_query:
            return "Формулировка запроса пуста. Уточни, что именно искать."

        try:
            api_key = _require_api_key(self.api_key)
        except RuntimeError as error:
            logger.warning("Search Plugin key missing: %s", error)
            return str(error)

        search_mode = "safe_search" if safe_search else "actual_info_web_search"
        body = {
            "query": search_query,
            "search_mode": search_mode,
            "additional_data": {"doc_count": max(1, max_results)},
        }

        headers = {
            "Authorization": api_key,
            "X-User-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Client-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Request-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "X-Session-ID": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "User-Agent": "agent-toolkit",
        }

        url = self.url or SEARCH_PLUGIN_DEFAULT_URL
        timeout = self.timeout or CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
        logger.info("Search Plugin request to %s with query='%s'", url, search_query)

        try:
            with httpx.Client(timeout=timeout) as client:
                response = client.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)
                response.raise_for_status()
                payload = response.json()
                if payload.get("payload", {}).get("status") == "error":
                    search_plugin_error_metric.inc()
                    raise ValueError(str(payload))

                documents = payload.get("payload", {}).get("documents", [])
                sources = payload.get("sources", {})
                limited_documents = documents[: max(1, max_results)]
                if not limited_documents:
                    search_plugin_empty_payload_metric.inc()
                result_text = _format_documents(limited_documents, sources)
                self.status = result_text
                return result_text
        except Exception as error:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.exception("Search Plugin request failed")
            search_plugin_empty_payload_metric.inc()
            return f"Search Plugin вернул ошибку или пустой ответ: {error}"

code.name: code
code.value:
"""Tool: validate credit snapshot JSON and persist to SQLite."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import sqlite3
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema import Data


class CreditSnapshotDBTool(Component):
    display_name = "Credit Snapshot DB Tool"
    description = "Validates JSON payload from LLM and saves structured snapshot rows into SQLite."
    icon = "database"
    name = "CreditSnapshotDBTool"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(
            name="record_json",
            display_name="Record JSON",
            info="Structured JSON produced by the LLM.",
            required=True,
            tool_mode=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="snapshot_id",
            display_name="Snapshot ID",
            info="Optional snapshot ID. If empty, tool generates UUID.",
            required=False,
            tool_mode=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="database_url",
            display_name="Database URL",
            info="SQLite URL like sqlite:////tmp/credit_products.db",
            value="sqlite:////tmp/credit_products.db",
            required=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Save Result", name="save_credit_snapshot", method="save_credit_snapshot"),
    ]

    def save_credit_snapshot(self) -> Data:
        text = (self.record_json or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return self._result("invalid_json", errors=["record_json is empty"], inserted_rows=0)

        try:
            payload = json.loads(text)
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            return self._result("invalid_json", errors=[f"JSON parse error: {exc}"], inserted_rows=0)

        validation_errors = self._validate_payload(payload)
        if validation_errors:
            return self._result("invalid_json", errors=validation_errors, inserted_rows=0)

        run_summary = payload.get("run_summary") or {}
        banks = payload.get("banks") or []
        resolved_snapshot_id = (self.snapshot_id or "").strip() or str(uuid.uuid4())

        try:
            db_path = self._sqlite_path(self.database_url)
            inserted = self._write_rows(db_path, resolved_snapshot_id, run_summary, banks)
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            return self._result("error", snapshot_id=resolved_snapshot_id, errors=[str(exc)], inserted_rows=0)

        return self._result("ok", snapshot_id=resolved_snapshot_id, inserted_rows=inserted)

    def _validate_payload(self, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
        errors: list[str] = []
        if not isinstance(payload, dict):
            return ["Top-level JSON must be an object"]

        for key in ["run_summary", "banks", "comparison"]:
            if key not in payload:
                errors.append(f"Missing top-level key: {key}")

        banks = payload.get("banks")
        if not isinstance(banks, list) or len(banks) == 0:
            errors.append("banks must be a non-empty array")
            return errors

        required_bank_fields = ["bank", "source_url", "confidence"]
        for idx, item in enumerate(banks):
            if not isinstance(item, dict):
                errors.append(f"banks[{idx}] must be an object")
                continue
            for field in required_bank_fields:
                value = item.get(field)
                if value is None or (isinstance(value, str) and not value.strip()):
                    errors.append(f"banks[{idx}].{field} is required")
        return errors

    def _sqlite_path(self, url: str) -> Path:
        raw = (url or "").strip()
        if raw.startswith("sqlite:///"):
            return Path(raw.replace("sqlite:///", "", 1))
        return Path(raw)

    def _write_rows(self, db_path: Path, snapshot_id: str, run_summary: dict[str, Any], banks: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
        db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        now_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()

        with sqlite3.connect(db_path) as conn:
            conn.execute(
                """
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS credit_product_snapshots (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    snapshot_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    topic TEXT,
                    generated_at TEXT,
                    bank TEXT,
                    product TEXT,
                    rate TEXT,
                    apr_psk TEXT,
                    max_amount TEXT,
                    term TEXT,
                    special_conditions TEXT,
                    source_url TEXT,
                    confidence TEXT,
                    missing_fields TEXT,
                    raw_record TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
                );
                """
            )

            rows = []
            for item in banks:
                rows.append(
                    (
                        snapshot_id,
                        str(run_summary.get("topic") or ""),
                        str(run_summary.get("generated_at") or ""),
                        str(item.get("bank") or ""),
                        str(item.get("product") or ""),
                        json.dumps(item.get("rate"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        json.dumps(item.get("apr_psk"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        json.dumps(item.get("max_amount"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        json.dumps(item.get("term"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        json.dumps(item.get("special_conditions"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        str(item.get("source_url") or ""),
                        str(item.get("confidence") or ""),
                        json.dumps(item.get("missing_fields"), ensure_ascii=False),
                        json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False),
                        now_iso,
                    )
                )

            conn.executemany(
                """
                INSERT INTO credit_product_snapshots (
                    snapshot_id, topic, generated_at, bank, product, rate, apr_psk, max_amount,
                    term, special_conditions, source_url, confidence, missing_fields, raw_record, created_at
                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
                """,
                rows,
            )
            conn.commit()

        return len(rows)

    def _result(
        self,
        status: str,
        snapshot_id: str | None = None,
        inserted_rows: int = 0,
        errors: list[str] | None = None,
    ) -> Data:
        payload = {
            "status": status,
            "snapshot_id": snapshot_id,
            "inserted_rows": inserted_rows,
            "errors": errors or [],
        }
        self.status = payload
        return Data(data={"text": json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False), **payload})

code.name: code
code.value:
from collections.abc import Generator
from typing import Any

import orjson
from fastapi.encoders import jsonable_encoder

from langflow.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from langflow.helpers.data import safe_convert
from langflow.inputs.inputs import BoolInput, DropdownInput, HandleInput, MessageTextInput
from langflow.schema.data import Data
from langflow.schema.dataframe import DataFrame
from langflow.schema.message import Message
from langflow.schema.properties import Source
from langflow.template.field.base import Output
from langflow.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatOutput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Output"
    description = "Display a chat message in the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/components-io#chat-output"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatOutput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        HandleInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Inputs",
            info="Message to be passed as output.",
            input_types=["Data", "DataFrame", "Message"],
            required=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
            advanced=True,
            info="Type of sender.",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="data_template",
            display_name="Data Template",
            value="{text}",
            advanced=True,
            info="Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="background_color",
            display_name="Background Color",
            info="The background color of the icon.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="chat_icon",
            display_name="Icon",
            info="The icon of the message.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="text_color",
            display_name="Text Color",
            info="The text color of the name",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="clean_data",
            display_name="Basic Clean Data",
            value=True,
            info="Whether to clean the data",
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="Output Message",
            name="message",
            method="message_response",
        ),
    ]

    def _build_source(self, id_: str | None, display_name: str | None, source: str | None) -> Source:
        source_dict = {}
        if id_:
            source_dict["id"] = id_
        if display_name:
            source_dict["display_name"] = display_name
        if source:
            # Handle case where source is a ChatOpenAI object
            if hasattr(source, "model_name"):
                source_dict["source"] = source.model_name
            elif hasattr(source, "model"):
                source_dict["source"] = str(source.model)
            else:
                source_dict["source"] = str(source)
        return Source(**source_dict)

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        # First convert the input to string if needed
        text = self.convert_to_string()

        # Get source properties
        source, icon, display_name, source_id = self.get_properties_from_source_component()
        background_color = self.background_color
        text_color = self.text_color
        if self.chat_icon:
            icon = self.chat_icon

        # Create or use existing Message object
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Message):
            message = self.input_value
            # Update message properties
            message.text = text
        else:
            message = Message(text=text)

        # Set message properties
        message.sender = self.sender
        message.sender_name = self.sender_name
        message.session_id = self.session_id
        message.flow_id = self.graph.flow_id if hasattr(self, "graph") else None
        message.properties.source = self._build_source(source_id, display_name, source)
        message.properties.icon = icon
        message.properties.background_color = background_color
        message.properties.text_color = text_color

        # Store message if needed
        if self.session_id and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(message)
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

    def _serialize_data(self, data: Data) -> str:
        """Serialize Data object to JSON string."""
        # Convert data.data to JSON-serializable format
        serializable_data = jsonable_encoder(data.data)
        # Serialize with orjson, enabling pretty printing with indentation
        json_bytes = orjson.dumps(serializable_data, option=orjson.OPT_INDENT_2)
        # Convert bytes to string and wrap in Markdown code blocks
        return "```json\n" + json_bytes.decode("utf-8") + "\n```"

    def _validate_input(self) -> None:
        """Validate the input data and raise ValueError if invalid."""
        if self.input_value is None:
            msg = "Input data cannot be None"
            raise ValueError(msg)
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list) and not all(
            isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str) for item in self.input_value
        ):
            invalid_types = [
                type(item).__name__
                for item in self.input_value
                if not isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str)
            ]
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, got {invalid_types}"
            raise TypeError(msg)
        if not isinstance(
            self.input_value,
            Message | Data | DataFrame | str | list | Generator | type(None),
        ):
            type_name = type(self.input_value).__name__
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, Generator or None, got {type_name}"
            raise TypeError(msg)

    def convert_to_string(self) -> str | Generator[Any, None, None]:
        """Convert input data to string with proper error handling."""
        self._validate_input()
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list):
            return "\n".join([safe_convert(item, clean_data=self.clean_data) for item in self.input_value])
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Generator):
            return self.input_value
        return safe_convert(self.input_value)

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

text_color.info: The text color of the name
text_color.name: text_color

node.description: Executes SQL queries on SQLAlchemy-compatible databases.

add_error.info: If True, the error will be added to the result
add_error.name: add_error

code.name: code
code.value:
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any

from langchain_community.utilities import SQLDatabase
from sqlalchemy.exc import SQLAlchemyError

from langflow.custom.custom_component.component_with_cache import ComponentWithCache
from langflow.io import BoolInput, MessageTextInput, MultilineInput, Output
from langflow.schema.dataframe import DataFrame
from langflow.schema.message import Message
from langflow.services.cache.utils import CacheMiss

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from sqlalchemy.engine import Result


class SQLComponent(ComponentWithCache):
    """A sql component."""

    display_name = "SQL Database"
    description = "Executes SQL queries on SQLAlchemy-compatible databases."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/components-data#sql-database"
    icon = "database"
    name = "SQLComponent"
    metadata = {"keywords": ["sql", "database", "query", "db", "fetch"]}

    def __init__(self, **kwargs) -> None:
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.db: SQLDatabase = None

    def maybe_create_db(self):
        if self.database_url != "":
            cached_db = self._shared_component_cache.get(self.database_url)
            if not isinstance(cached_db, CacheMiss):
                self.db = cached_db
                return
            self.log("Connecting to database")
            try:
                self.db = SQLDatabase.from_uri(self.database_url)
            except Exception as e:
                msg = f"An error occurred while connecting to the database: {e}"
                raise ValueError(msg) from e
            self._shared_component_cache.set(self.database_url, self.db)

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(name="database_url", display_name="Database URL", required=True),
        MultilineInput(name="query", display_name="SQL Query", tool_mode=True, required=True),
        BoolInput(name="include_columns", display_name="Include Columns", value=True, tool_mode=True, advanced=True),
        BoolInput(
            name="add_error",
            display_name="Add Error",
            value=False,
            tool_mode=True,
            info="If True, the error will be added to the result",
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Result Table", name="run_sql_query", method="run_sql_query"),
    ]

    def build_component(
        self,
    ) -> Message:
        error = None
        self.maybe_create_db()
        try:
            result = self.db.run(self.query, include_columns=self.include_columns)
            self.status = result
        except SQLAlchemyError as e:
            msg = f"An error occurred while running the SQL Query: {e}"
            self.log(msg)
            result = str(e)
            self.status = result
            error = repr(e)

        if self.add_error and error is not None:
            result = f"{result}\n\nError: {error}\n\nQuery: {self.query}"
        elif error is not None:
            # Then we won't add the error to the result
            result = self.query

        return Message(text=result)

    def __execute_query(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
        self.maybe_create_db()
        try:
            cursor: Result[Any] = self.db.run(self.query, fetch="cursor")
            return [x._asdict() for x in cursor.fetchall()]
        except SQLAlchemyError as e:
            msg = f"An error occurred while running the SQL Query: {e}"
            self.log(msg)
            raise ValueError(msg) from e

    def run_sql_query(self) -> DataFrame:
        result = self.__execute_query()
        df_result = DataFrame(result)
        self.status = df_result
        return df_result

code.name: code
code.value:
"""Tool: calculate market analytics from historical credit snapshots."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import re
import sqlite3
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path

from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema import Data


class CreditMarketAnalyticsTool(Component):
    display_name = "Credit Market Analytics Tool"
    description = "Reads snapshots from SQLite and returns trend analytics for agent reasoning."
    icon = "line-chart"
    name = "CreditMarketAnalyticsTool"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(
            name="record_json",
            display_name="Focus",
            info="Optional focus (e.g., market, Sber, VTB, T-Bank, Alfa).",
            required=False,
            tool_mode=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="snapshot_id",
            display_name="Bank Filter",
            info="Optional bank name filter. Leave empty for all banks.",
            required=False,
            tool_mode=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="database_url",
            display_name="Database URL",
            info="SQLite URL like sqlite:////tmp/credit_products.db",
            value="sqlite:////tmp/credit_products.db",
            required=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Analytics", name="get_credit_market_analytics", method="get_credit_market_analytics"),
    ]

    def get_credit_market_analytics(self) -> Data:
        db_path = self._sqlite_path(self.database_url)
        if not db_path.exists():
            return self._result("error", errors=[f"Database file not found: {db_path}"])

        rows = self._load_rows(db_path)
        if not rows:
            return self._result("error", errors=["No rows found in credit_product_snapshots"])

        focus = (self.record_json or "").strip().lower()
        bank_filter = (self.snapshot_id or "").strip().lower()

        snapshots = defaultdict(dict)
        for row in rows:
            snapshots[row["generated_at"]][row["bank"]] = row

        ordered_dates = sorted(snapshots.keys())
        first_date = ordered_dates[0]
        last_date = ordered_dates[-1]

        bank_names = sorted({r["bank"] for r in rows})
        if bank_filter:
            bank_names = [b for b in bank_names if bank_filter in b.lower()]

        bank_trends = []
        facts = []

        market_first = []
        market_last = []

        for bank in bank_names:
            first_row = snapshots.get(first_date, {}).get(bank)
            last_row = snapshots.get(last_date, {}).get(bank)
            if not first_row or not last_row:
                continue

            first_rate = self._extract_percent(first_row.get("rate", ""))
            last_rate = self._extract_percent(last_row.get("rate", ""))
            first_apr = self._extract_percent(first_row.get("apr_psk", ""))
            last_apr = self._extract_percent(last_row.get("apr_psk", ""))
            first_amount = self._extract_number(first_row.get("max_amount", ""))
            last_amount = self._extract_number(last_row.get("max_amount", ""))

            if first_rate is not None and last_rate is not None:
                market_first.append(first_rate)
                market_last.append(last_rate)

            rate_delta = (last_rate - first_rate) if first_rate is not None and last_rate is not None else None
            apr_delta = (last_apr - first_apr) if first_apr is not None and last_apr is not None else None
            amount_delta = (last_amount - first_amount) if first_amount is not None and last_amount is not None else None

            if amount_delta is not None and abs(amount_delta) < 50000:
                trend_label = "stagnating"
            elif amount_delta is None:
                trend_label = "unknown"
            elif amount_delta > 0:
                trend_label = "growing"
            else:
                trend_label = "declining"

            bank_trends.append(
                {
                    "bank": bank,
                    "from": first_date,
                    "to": last_date,
                    "rate_start": first_rate,
                    "rate_end": last_rate,
                    "rate_delta_pp": rate_delta,
                    "apr_delta_pp": apr_delta,
                    "max_amount_start": first_amount,
                    "max_amount_end": last_amount,
                    "max_amount_delta": amount_delta,
                    "trend": trend_label,
                }
            )

            if rate_delta is not None and amount_delta is not None:
                facts.append(
                    f"{bank}: ставка {first_rate:.1f}% -> {last_rate:.1f}% ({rate_delta:+.1f} п.п.), max_amount {int(first_amount)} -> {int(last_amount)} ({int(amount_delta):+d})"
                )

        market_rate_delta = None
        if market_first and market_last:
            market_rate_delta = (sum(market_last) / len(market_last)) - (sum(market_first) / len(market_first))

        rankings = sorted(
            bank_trends,
            key=lambda x: (x.get("max_amount_delta") if x.get("max_amount_delta") is not None else -10**18),
            reverse=True,
        )

        top = [x["bank"] for x in rankings[:2]]
        lag = [x["bank"] for x in rankings[-1:]] if rankings else []

        market_comment = "moderate_growth"
        if market_rate_delta is not None and market_rate_delta > -0.2:
            market_comment = "flat_or_weak_improvement"
        elif market_rate_delta is not None and market_rate_delta < -0.8:
            market_comment = "strong_improvement"

        response = {
            "status": "ok",
            "focus": focus or None,
            "period": {"from": first_date, "to": last_date, "snapshots": len(ordered_dates)},
            "market": {
                "avg_rate_delta_pp": market_rate_delta,
                "regime": market_comment,
            },
            "leaders_by_growth": top,
            "laggards": lag,
            "bank_trends": bank_trends,
            "facts": facts,
            "usage_hint": "Use facts and bank_trends in the final answer; mention raw SQL checks when needed.",
            "errors": [],
        }

        if focus and "без аналитики" in focus:
            response["usage_hint"] = "User asked to avoid analytics; use run_sql_query for raw evidence."

        self.status = response
        return Data(data={"text": json.dumps(response, ensure_ascii=False), **response})

    def _load_rows(self, db_path: Path) -> list[dict]:
        query = """
            SELECT generated_at, bank, rate, apr_psk, max_amount, confidence
            FROM credit_product_snapshots
            ORDER BY generated_at ASC, bank ASC
        """
        with sqlite3.connect(db_path) as conn:
            conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
            rows = conn.execute(query).fetchall()
        return [dict(r) for r in rows]

    def _sqlite_path(self, url: str) -> Path:
        raw = (url or "").strip()
        if raw.startswith("sqlite:///"):
            return Path(raw.replace("sqlite:///", "", 1))
        return Path(raw)

    def _extract_percent(self, value: str):
        if value is None:
            return None
        text = str(value)
        match = re.search(r"(\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?)", text)
        if not match:
            return None
        return float(match.group(1).replace(",", "."))

    def _extract_number(self, value: str):
        if value is None:
            return None
        text = str(value).replace(" ", "")
        match = re.search(r"(\d+)", text)
        if not match:
            return None
        return float(match.group(1))

    def _result(self, status: str, errors: list[str] | None = None) -> Data:
        payload = {"status": status, "errors": errors or []}
        self.status = payload
        return Data(data={"text": json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False), **payload})

node.description:
## Тестовый запрос:
  - "Собери HTML-дашборд по данным из БД: три графика в контейнерах chartA/chartB/chartC, не дублируй JS в чат. Сохрани как step10_demo.html."

Еще примеры:
  - Сделай дашборд в стиле risk-view: выдели банки с высоким confidence=low, покажи как менялись max_amount и rate. Добавь цветовую кодировку по confidence. Сохрани как step10_risk_view.html.
  - Построй дашборд только по двум банкам: Сбер и Т-Банк. Нужны 3 графика: rate trend, amount trend, delta bar (last-first). Сохрани как step10_sber_tbank.html.
  - Сделай обзор по всей таблице: график распределения max_amount (histogram), boxplot по банкам, и heatmap корреляции числовых полей. Сохрани как step10_distribution.html.

description: Шаг 10 (продвинутый): агент генерирует JS (renderDashboard), tool валидирует, сохраняет HTML и загружает в Files.
name: Step 10 - Dashboard codegen export
